primary_text:
Could you name the farm that raised your last steak?

Most of us couldn't. We know the supermarket, the aisle, maybe the brand. But the farm? The farmer? That information never makes it to the shelf.

FarmThru changes that. Every product comes from a named regenerative farm. Rachel's Farm beef from Kempsey. Paris Creek biodynamic dairy. Collins Wild Caught salmon.

Real names. Real places. Food you can trace.

Collect it fresh from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
headline: Could you name the farm?
description: Every product traces to a real farm and a real farmer. Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
creative_brief: Farmer portrait, direct to camera, warm smile. Name and farm location overlaid. Feels like an introduction, not marketing.
